headline: Solar power scales up, putting power grids back at the heart of the energy transition
summary: According to the annual report from energy think tank Ember, low-carbon sources covered the entirety of the 849 TWh increase in global electricity demand. Consequently, fossil fuel generation saw a...

headline: First Solar to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: FSLR heads into Q1 earnings with tax credits and U.S. capacity boosting margins, but tariffs and weak Asia utilization may temper results.
